title: Yeh Dil Aashiqanaa
overview: Yeh Dil Ashiqana is the story of Karan and Pooja who are studying in the same college in Poona. They meet and fall in love and their romance progresses without any problems until one day while going to her brother's house in Mumbai.

title: Kennedy
overview: An insomniac former cop, Kennedy has been presumed dead for years. Yet, in secret, he continues to serve a corrupt system while seeking redemption. Halfway between thriller and film noir, Kennedy chronicles a violent and bloody vendetta in the dark streets of Mumbai. At the rate of the murders, Kennedy's character reveals itself more and more and sinks into a spiral that seems to have no way out.

title: 2 BHK
overview: A lonely housewife and a conflicted artist find an unexpected connection, discovering that being true to oneself can change everything.

title: Shahkot
overview: Iqbal Singh, a determined Punjabi youth who decides to pursue his passion of venturing abroad, only for his life to take an unexpected turn.

title: The Protector
overview: A detective investigates mysterious deaths at Manakkal Tharavadu manor in Airavathakkuzhi village, where locals fear evil haunts. His probe into family secrets unleashes dangerous events affecting the community.

title: Mathru
overview: A town is rattled by serial kidnappings each marked by a cryptic code. Vijay haunted by strange dreams, becomes a suspect when the same code is found on his phone. But when his girlfriend and then he himself go missing the truth begins to unfeld Victims are being brainwashed by a mysterious system to worship an unknown idel Whos behind it and why?

title: Cactus Pears
overview: Anand, a 30-something city dweller compelled to spend a 10-day mourning period for his father in the rugged countryside of western India, tenderly bonds with a local farmer who is struggling to stay unmarried. As the mourning ends, forcing his return, Anand must decide the fate of his relationship born under duress.

title: Bugonia
overview: Two conspiracy obsessed young men kidnap the high-powered CEO of a major company, convinced that she is an alien intent on destroying planet Earth.

title: Spirit of the Flesh
overview: A new film by Sheik Althaf Hussain. The plot is unknown at this moment; currently in private screenings and festival submissions.

title: Ali Ali
overview: In a quiet Rajasthani village, young Ali clings to his cricket bat as his friends chase it. What starts as playful mischief reveals a film crew struggling to finish their shoot, blurring childhood and the fragile magic of cinema.

title: The Academy of Fine Arts
overview: A crew of criminals execute the perfect heist, stealing a priceless liquor bottle from a notorious gang leader. But what begins as a clean getaway spirals into a storm of betrayal, bloodshed, and long-buried secrets. As the truth unravels, they discover the real battle isn't for the loot - it's for survival.

title: Sentimental Value
overview: Sisters Nora and Agnes reunite with their estranged father, the charismatic Gustav, a once-renowned director who offers stage actress Nora a role in what he hopes will be his comeback film. When Nora turns it down, she soon discovers he has given her part to an eager young Hollywood star.

title: Eternity
overview: In an afterlife where souls have one week to decide where to spend eternity, Joan is faced with the impossible choice between the man she spent her life with and her first love, who died young and has waited decades for her to arrive.

title: Maruva Tarama
overview: At a Goa restaurant, Anvi meets a naval officer for arranged marriage talks. Though beautiful and from a wealthy family, she hides a secret - her heart belongs to another. She declines his proposal.

title: Kis Kisko Pyaar Karoon 2
overview: Mohan wants to marry the love of his life, Sania, but destiny has a madcap plan! He ends up marrying three women of different religions and chaos follows.

title: Motorcycle
overview: When Harishchandra`s demand for a motorcycle as dowry spins out of control, a chain of hilarious chaos begins! Between love, ego, and unexpected twists, Motorcycle is a full-on family comedy that rides through laughter, emotions, and a heartfelt message.

title: Tu Meri Main Tera Main Tera Tu Meri
overview: When a carefree NRI wedding planner and a headstrong novelist collide during a wild summer in Croatia, sparks fly in ways neither expected. What begins as playful clashes soon transforms into something deeper – only to be tested when love, family, and tradition pull them in opposite directions.

title: Ikkis
overview: Second Lieutenant and India's youngest Param Vir Chakra recipient, Arun Khetarpal, gave his life fighting for his battalion and the country during the 1971 Battle of Basantar. Ikkis also takes a reflective look at the futility of war through the eyes of Khetarpal's father, who visits his ancestral home in Sargodha and Alma Mater for reunion, which now happens to be in post-partition Pakistan, 30 years later.

title: Psych Siddhartha
overview: Siddharth's life is a string of misfortunes, losing love, money, and dignity, making him the unwitting star of a slum-based comedy of errors. Hope only reappears in the form of Shravya, a no-nonsense single mother. However, just as Siddharth begins to rebuild his life and pursue a chance at love, his past resurfaces to threaten everything.

title: Nilakanta
overview: Saraswathipuram is a Village,where Education is Well Valued.nilakanta Work as a Tailor in That Village.nilakanta is Wise and Good From Childhood, He Believes in Karma but Unfortunately Karma Curses Him, No Matter How Big an Opponent He is,he Fights Bravely for His Life.who is That Rival ?

title: The Rajasaab
overview: Seeking his lost grandfather, a young man enters a haunted mansion and awakens a family curse powerful enough to upend both his life and reality.

title: Hunter Among Us
overview: A group video call unhinges when one friend threatens suicide online. Next - hijacking their feed, a masked hacker turns the group’s desperate attempts to save their friend into a sadistic mind game.

title: Parasakthi
overview: In a time of civil disobedience in the erstwhile Madras state, a ruthless intelligent officer turns up with a duty to track down rebels. Chezhian and his brother Chinndurai are of different personalities, one a hardworking fireman, the other a rebel. A deadly game of cat and mouse ensues as Chezhian is forced to abandon his peaceful ways to protect his people and takes on the mighty forces, culminating in a fierce battle for justice.

title: Mana ShankaraVaraPrasad Garu
overview: National security officer Vara Prasad, protecting his estranged wife and kids from a vengeful ex-cop, sees it as a chance to rebuild their relationship after six years apart.

title: Anaganaga Oka Raju
overview: A lazy, entitled brat who wants to lead an easy life is in for a rude shock that changes the course of his life.

title: Naari Naari Naduma Murari
overview: A young man's life turns upside down when he finds himself caught between two women, leading to an unexpected love triangle filled with emotions, misunderstandings, and tough decisions. As relationships intertwine, he must confront his feelings, face reality, and choose what truly matters, blending romance with heartfelt family drama.

title: Bhanupriya Bhooter Hotel
overview: When ghosts come calling on guests at a hotel, all hell breaks loose.

title: Bokshi
overview: Anahita, traumatised by the brutal disappearance of her mother, finds comfort in Shalini, her history teacher. On an unconventional school excursion to a mysterious prehistoric site, she confronts her terrifying destiny.

title: By Another Name
overview: Jae-hyun and Su-jin, even when confronted with death, cannot abandon their restless desire to make a film—because they believe that very impulse is their love for each other.

title: Two Voices into an Echo
overview: Describes a woman's emotions at a turning point in life - love, parting, and birth.

title: The Conversation
overview: What starts off as a routine therapy session for Michael slowly turns out to be not what it seems.

title: The Perfect Resume
overview: Yuvraj Singhania is in pursuit of greatness.  His resume? Flawless. His methods? Ruthless. He is set out to win but the question is what will it cost to everyone else?  A film about a student who believes competition is war and second place is first loser.

title: Parentheses
overview: In the span of a week, a friendship bends under the weight of secrets and half-told stories. Between riverside sunsets and empty streets, two lives trace the fragile line between holding on and letting go.

title: The Tablet
overview: The story of two HIV survivors, Kayal,  a single mother and prabhu, her only  child who navigate their life through  medications and social constructs in a  smal town of Sivakasi.

title: Even If This Love Disappears Tonight
overview: A high school girl wakes up each day with no memory of yesterday. When she agrees to date a shy classmate, can their love grow with every new beginning?

title: Iniyum
overview: This story is centered around the Sri Ramaswamy Temple in the village of Ramanjira and the family home in Chemmangad, where the rituals of the templeare traditionally performed. Vasudevan Ezhuthachan, the head of the familyhome, was always a refuge for the villagers. The door was never closed to thosewho came hungry. However, it was his neighbor

title: ROOM 110
overview: The story of the life of a college student whose life changes after a new entity comes a new into the picture.

title: Baanancha Daati
overview: This song is about gratitude that follows hope. Life has a way of unfolding beyond plans, and sometimes it blesses us with more than we could ever ask for. In those moments, it reminds us of how small we are in the larger scheme of things. In one such turn of life, I met Meghana, my dear wife. This song is my expression of gratitude to her, and to life for this gift.

title: Aashaan
overview: Aashaan dreams of cinema until a 150-member film crew enters his life, bringing movie magic within reach. Chasing his big break, he confronts the industry's harsh realities.

title: KETTENREAKTION
overview: He is chained to a spiral.  A spiral between post–rock bottom and pre-comeback.  And this is his reaction.

title: Scarlet
overview: After failing to avenge her father's murder, Princess Scarlet, wakes up in the "Land of the Dead." In this world filled with madness, if she does not achieve her revenge against her nemesis and reach the "No End Place," she will become "Void" and cease to exist. Can Scarlet find a way to live at the end of her endless journey?

title: The Strangers: Chapter 3
overview: Tethered by a frightening conclusion, Maya and the Strangers are locked on an unavoidable, unforgiving collision course — a showdown that proves they’re far from strangers now.

title: With Love
overview: Sathya reluctantly agrees to a blind date arranged by his sister and meets Monisha. They discover they attended the same school years ago. Bonding over shared memories and old crushes, they reconnect with their past and grow closer.

title: Yogida
overview: It is story about a Honest and straightforward lady police Inspector Yogi works in Coimbatore, where she proves a textile mill owner’s “suicide” is actually a murder by his own son, leading to her transfer to the punishment area Vyasarpadi in North Chennai. There she confronts ruthless don Shekar Babu, who controls the area and its police through fear, power, and political influence, but Yogi refuses to bow down and begins taking action against his network.

title: OCD
overview: When her unpunished childhood abuser returns, Shweta confronts her past through a dangerously precise plan for revenge. ﻿

title: Ashakal Aayiram
overview: A social media enthusiast chases fame until a major film production arrives in his neighborhood, suddenly bringing his dreams of stardom within reach in ways he never imagined.

title: Sukran
overview: Marked by a horoscope that makes him take the blame for things he never did, Nandu grows up carrying the weight of an unfair fate. Years later, the return of his childhood love brings challenges and turning points that change his life forever.

title: Honey
overview: A broken family, a forbidden ritual, and a child trapped between reality and delusion. Honey exposes systemic abuse and spiritual madness, where the most terrifying monsters are painfully real.

title: Bebe Main Badmash Banuga
overview: A gangster-in-training kidnaps the daughter of a prominent businessman in an attempt to win his boss' favour, but gets caught up in a web of deceit and conflict.

title: Euphoria
overview: A young woman and her family seek justice after she is raped by a group of young men who come from powerful and influential backgrounds.

title: Vadh 2
overview: A police officer's pursuit of truth in a shocking prison crime intertwines with the lives of a widowed prison guard and a soon to be released inmate, unravelling a web of morality and redemption.

title: Rakkasapuradhol
overview: Inspector Shiva an alcoholic officer struggling with schizophrenia, is transferred to Rakkasapura, a seemingly quiet village with a low crime rate. Soon The village’s peace is shattered by a series of gruesome murders. Young women are found dead, dressed in bridal finery with their faces charred beyond recognition. Witness as a troubled cop in rural India confronts his own demons while pursuing a complex case that tests his moral boundaries and beliefs.

title: Lagnacha Shot
overview: Abhi is forced into an unwanted marriage and escapes on the wedding day. On the same train, Kriti, also a runaway bride, is fleeing her own fate. Strangers brought together by chance and misunderstandings, their journey turns into one of conflict, connection, and self-discovery. As emotions unfold, they must face a question: Does running away truly set you free?

title: Sri Chidambaram Garu
overview: An insecure bricklayer harbours dreams of leaving his village to escape judgement but soon falls for a local woman.

title: Lagan Laagii Re
overview: A young woman struggles to come to terms with the end of her relationship.

title: Karuthal
overview: A jobless graduate torn between love, friendship, and responsibility sets out for a new life abroad, but a shocking tragedy brings him back home where he finds purpose, truth, and redemption.

title: Ranapati Shivray Swari Agra
overview: A captive king turns the tables on his Mughal captors, engineering an ingenious escape from Agra that will echo through centuries of Indian history.

title: Blood Roses
overview: In Hyderabad, a chilling series of murders rattles the city, each victim found with the same organ missing. As fear spreads, the police race to uncover who the killer is and what connects the crimes, leading to a tense hunt where the truth finally comes to light.

title: The Shattered Land
overview: A tribute. A protest. A memory.  Marking 50 years without Ritwik Ghatak.

title: The Return of the Army Man
overview: The murder of an innocent civilian by the Gange's war fighters ignites the fury of Tiger, an army man who embarks on a relentless path of revenge. As he delivers justice, the law ultimately stands with him, blurring the line between vengeance and righteousness.

title: Sumathi Sathakam
overview: A village shopkeeper pursues the woman he loves, but faces obstacles from local beliefs and strict customs in his wild attempt to overcome community opposition and claim her heart.

title: Rubaab
overview: Suraj, charming and quietly confident, falls for bold, independent Vaishali. Their growing romance faces mounting challenges and tests. When destiny steps in, their story takes an unexpected direction.

title: Common Man
overview: Raghav is a common man struggling for good life and peace of mind. But unnecessary disorder in obeying rules by others, irritates him a lot. One day he decides to teach lesson to such people. And He traps himself into huge trouble.

title: The Late Kunjappa
overview: Kunjappa, a poor old man, dies in a village. As his relatives gather with the body through the night, small incidents unfold, revealing quiet human truths.

title: JC The University
overview: A ten-year journey traces Madhusudan, aka Maddy, from a middle-class final-year degree student into the dark worlds of jail and the underworld

title: Misty
overview: A seemingly harmless night of partying pushes a timid, emotionally repressed writer into a chain of irreversible consequences, forcing him to confront guilt, fear, and accountability as chaos spirals beyond his control.

title: Irulan
overview: Three men step into a dark forest at night, unaware that something hidden waits for them in the shadows. As the silence deepens, a mystery begins to unfold ,one that will change everything before dawn.

title: Oh Laila Tere Peeche Padd Gaye Apni Jaan Nisaar Kar Gaye
overview: 3 Majnus And 33 Lailas !!!!!!  Just Imagine The Chaos................

title: Line Of Control
overview: When a young man disappears during the army's intensified anti-terrorist activities in Kashmir in 1993, his best friend will do anything to find him, even if it means sacrificing himself. Based on the novel "The Collaborator" by Mirza Waheed.

title: Elephant Shit & Other Stories
overview: In a city caught between aspiration and decay, three bars move along their separate orbits. Each a small kingdom of delusion with its own social universe, fragile mythologies, and everyday theatre of performance and pretense. But as their stories begin to bleed into one another, a darkly humorous, unexpectedly tender, and occasionally harsh mosaic emerges, revealing the soft fictions that shape our world.

title: Upon Starvation
overview: Vivek, a 30-something pickpocket in Pune, uses seduction as a distraction, pressing against men on crowded buses to steal and satisfy his desires. Detached, he exploits others’ hunger while suppressing his own. Meeting Kartik, a soft-spoken student seeking genuine intimacy, disrupts Vivek’s control. What begins as a hunt unravels into vulnerability, as Kartik’s tenderness challenges Vivek’s transactional world. The film blends the raw eroticism of Vivek’s encounters with the quiet, messy intimacy Kartik offers. As Vivek grapples with feelings he has long suppressed, the line between hunter and hunted blurs, leaving him to confront the cost of his transactional life.

title: Side B
overview: Sidharth gets an old cassette from a relative’s house, and his life changes after playing it.

title: The Night of Life: Before You Think About It
overview: During a single intense night, a father and son become trapped in an unexpected situation that forces them to confront guilt, responsibility, and a life-changing decision that tests their relationship.

title: State of Fear
overview: As São Paulo erupts in an unprecedented wave of violence, a lawyer with underworld ties must strike a deal with the police to rescue her kidnapped niece.

title: Mithya
overview: In a mind void of the line separating reality, broken pencils tells the truth.

title: Roulette
overview: Four friends find themselves pawns in a sadistic game of Russian Roulette, where the price of a wrong answer is the life of the person sitting next to them.

title: "Wuthering Heights"
overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

title: Sampradayini Suppini Suddapoosani
overview: After the accidental murder of a police sergeant, a man and his family are forced to cover up their tracks to avoid suspicion.

title: Crime 101
overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

title: Vanaveera
overview: A descendant of the Vanara clan is pushed into conflict when a modern-day Ravana seizes his only bike for an election rally. What starts as a petty injustice soon erupts into a fierce fight for self-respect and dignity.

title: Sirāt
overview: A man and his son arrive at a rave lost in the mountains of Morocco. They are looking for Marina, their daughter and sister, who disappeared months ago at another rave. Driven by fate, they decide to follow a group of ravers in search of one last party, in hopes Marina will be there.

title: The Singers
overview: An impromptu singing contest at a dive bar turns a lonely night into a soul-baring moment of shared harmony.

title: Joe's College Road Trip
overview: To teach his sheltered grandson about the real world, Madea's foul-mouthed brother Joe takes the college-bound teen on a raucous cross-country road trip.

title: Pennum Porattum
overview: When a woman and her dog face public hostility, a village's hidden tensions erupt. A stark examination of mob mentality, social judgment, and how communities can turn cruel when seeking to punish perceived wrongs.

title: Funky
overview: A debut director who falls in love with his producer's daughter

title: Amaravathiki Aahvanam
overview: When Amaravathi calls, fear answers. This gripping narrative combines spine-tingling visuals and powerful performances into an edge-of-the-seat thriller that explores a chilling summons from the unknown.

title: My Lord
overview: A man and his wife battle bureaucracy after being wrongly declared dead, while he confronts a kidney trafficking ring connected to corrupt politicians that destroyed his life.

title: Pookie
overview: He struggles to tell her he wants to separate. When he finally does, she shares the same thoughts. Suddenly realizing he doesn't want to lose her, they reconcile though both still privately consider breaking up.

title: Spa
overview: The narrative follows the intertwined lives of people connected to La Paradise, an urban massage therapy centre. It centres on Mathan, a man struggling to distinguish between the reality of love and its fictionalised ideals. Through a sharp lens of social satire, the story explores adult themes and human behaviour within this unique urban setting.

title: Nilave
overview: Nilave traces the journey of Arjun, a lonely and emotionally anxious young man searching for companionship. In a world of fleeting connections, he discovers a magical love and goes to extraordinary lengths to make it eternal.

title: Mylanji
overview: Surya, a National Geographic photographer who struggles with a rare speech disorder, travels to Ooty to capture a rare bird and unexpectedly meets Charu, a lively orphan trapped by a forced marriage. Desperate to escape, Charu decides to fall in love with another man, while unknowingly growing closer to Surya during their birding journeys.. On the day Kathir comes to take Charu away, fate stands still—leaving one haunting question: will love choose truth, or sacrifice?

title: Kaa - The Forest
overview: When a Cold Blooded Murderer Victor Mahadev’s (Salim Ghouse) Killing Freak Gangs Chasing After Two Boys Into Deep Forests. A Wild Life Photographer Venba Subbaiya (Andrea Jeremiah) Got Into Their Game of Death by Accident. Who is Going to See the Next Dawn is the Unfolding Story. Whether Venba or Victor, Because Survival Really Matters in Deep Forest.

title: Mon Maaney Naa
overview: A carefree young man remains oblivious to the girl who truly loves him until his best friend's wedding forces him to confront his real feelings. In a race against time, he stumbles through chaos, emotions, and self-discovery.

title: Sukhamano Sukhamanu
overview: Theo, an ambulance driver stigmatized by his town, begins seeing visions of deceased people he transports. His troubled mind, shaped by childhood loss, creates these apparitions as emotional substitutes for connection.

title: Bara Badhu
overview: Two friends plot their way out of unemployment and despair, only to become pawns in village power games. Their quest for a better life becomes a harrowing test of loyalty and resilience.

title: Dream Girl
overview: He Falls in Love With an Angel Who Appears in His Dreams. That Love Ends in Heartbreak. Yet The Same Emotions Continue in Real Life Without Changing a Single Frame. The Story Follows How the Hero, Carrying the Same Love in His Heart, Finds a Way to Reclaim the Angel He Lost in His Dream, This Time in Reality

title: Last 1%
overview: Last 1% follows Aariz, a young student living away from home, whose life suddenly turns tense after receiving an urgent message about his mother. With only 1% battery left on his phone, he rushes through the city trying to reach home while facing unexpected situations and people along the way. As time keeps slipping away, Aariz must make difficult choices that test his emotions, patience, and humanity.  The film is a gripping emotional journey about time, decisions, and the moments that can change a life forever.

title: Punha Ekda Sade Made 3
overview: Three eccentric brothers maintain their "no women, no marriage" rule at their garage, but a return sparks fresh chaos. As old habits clash with new troubles, the iconic trio finds their world hilariously spiraling out of control.

title: Bas Ek Pal
overview: Love is contagious wherever you are.

title: Ima Chimmathe
overview: Dreams Dreams Dreams...  Are they real?

title: Rakta Golapa
overview: A woman investigates her husband's apparent suicide shortly after their arranged marriage, aided by police and her father-in-law. As clues emerge that seem to explain his death, a shocking discovery reveals a sinister truth beneath.

title: Mohor
overview: A heartfelt, emotionally driven short story about love and heartbreak, following a young woman navigating loss of faith in love and the slow mending of her heart.

title: Adamya
overview: After a political assassination fails, 23-year-old Palash becomes a fugitive, hunted by the very system he once believed in. As he flees through the conflict-ridden Sundarbans, his understanding of ideology, resistance, and identity begins to shift. Caught between labels of extremist and revolutionary, anti-national and patriot, his journey becomes a gripping character study of belief, survival, and an unbroken spirit that refuses to die.

title: Therincha Kadhalinga
overview: Karthi falls in love with a village girl named Pechi,and brings her to Chennai. Karthi suspects Pechi of having illicit relationship with his friends. Pechi does not like Karhik"s suspecting character,as a result she returns to her village and marries Surender.

title: Couple Friendly
overview: After connecting on a rideshare app, a young couple struggling to achieve their respective dreams form a romantic connection.

title: Seetha Payanam
overview: Chef Seetha survives an accident and seeks to thank her saviors. She falls for stranger Abhishek, who hides a secret. When truth surfaces, she must choose between love, honesty, and her future.

title: Dark Chocolate
overview: After a string of failures, former star Yagna faces mockery from rival Dinesh through PR and fake accounts. Banned from Film Chamber for his attitude, can the "one-hit wonder" make a comeback?

title: Behind Our House Is a Garden
overview: An autobiographical story, set in the city of Grozny in 1994 — its last peaceful year before the outbreak of the First Chechen War, Russia. It follows the life of one family and the tight-knit community of a single courtyard — a place full of warmth, quiet beauty, and the haunting presence of what was to come.

title: The Last Reel
overview: Vinu and Thommen, often run into trouble at school. One day, things slip out of hand and they both get tangled in a mess.

title: Love, Literally!
overview: In a 16th-century palace, a young prince vows eternal devotion to a princess. The innocence of forever is interrupted by a friend from the future who knows too much.

title: Together
overview: “Together” follows a quiet young man who finds comfort in the gentle rituals of a café, where love blooms in silence and familiarity. In the warmth of repeated moments, he holds on to a presence that feels real, even if the world around him never sees it. It’s a tender story of longing, memory, and the kind of love that lives deeply inside — whether shared or not.

title: LipLock
overview: Liplock explores modern relationships, misunderstandings, and second chances.

title: Haye Hukku Haye Hukku Haaye Haaye Haaye
overview: Daksh and Insha Are Close Friends Who Have Never Seen Each Other Romantically, But Their Families Misinterpret Their Bond And Arrange Their Engagement  Desperate To Escape , They Make A Dramatic Announcement - Daksh Declares That He Is Gay, While Insha A Lesbian - And The Engagement Is Immediately Called Off Leaving Their Families In Shock , What Begins As A Silly Plan To Avoid Marriage Slowly Backfires When Daksh And Insha, Spending More Time Together Amidst The Chaos , Begin To Develop Real Feelings Now Trapped By Their Own Lie , They Must Find The Courage To Confess Both The Truth And Their Love Turning The Raita They Created Into A Happily-Ever-After

title: Chicken Curry
overview: A boy heads out of his home excitedly after an argument with his mother, on a simple errand: buy chicken for the first time in his life. The excitement is shattered when he watches it die—violently. The moment forces him to choose between disgust and desire.

title: Call Me When You Wake Up
overview: A young man wakes up to a message from the girl he likes asking him to call her. What begins as an ordinary moment soon turns into a haunting realization as he confronts a silence he never expected. Call Me When You Wake Up is an intimate exploration of love, absence, and the unseen emotional battles people carry within themselves.

title: The Wild Robot
overview: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz is stranded on an uninhabited island. To survive the harsh environment, Roz bonds with the island's animals and cares for an orphaned baby goose.

title: Rental Family
overview: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

title: The Swedish Connection
overview: Swedish Foreign Ministry bureaucrat Gösta Engzell, overlooked during WWII, rescued thousands while turning supposedly neutral Sweden into a moral force. His efforts challenged the status quo and left a lasting humanitarian legacy.

title: Shazam
overview: in the early 2000s, shazam worked by calling a short code. you’d hold your phone near the music, hang up, shazam would match the audio on its servers and send the song details straight to you via sms. magic. always sounded like the brewing grounds for a potential love story. this is it.

title: GOAT
overview: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

title: Firebreak
overview: Little Lide disappears in the forest while her family packs up their home. As a fire breaks out, her mother must race to reach her before the flames do.

title: EPiC: Elvis Presley in Concert
overview: Long-lost footage from Elvis Presely's legendary Las Vegas residency in the 1970s woven together with rare 16mm footage from Elvis on Tour, and 8mm from the Graceland archive, plus recordings of Elvis telling "his side of the story" rediscovered during Baz Luhrmann's research for his 2022 film, Elvis.

title: Pavane
overview: Three lonely strangers meet at their department store jobs and find solace in each other's company while they explore connection and the nature of love.

title: Lucky the Superstar
overview: A stray puppy's adventure transforms lives: helping a child heal, bringing a family together, and causing political mayhem while finding her way home.

title: Famous Last Words: Eric Dane
overview: In this emotional interview, the late actor and ALS advocate Eric Dane shared his final message for the world — knowing it would not air until his death.

title: Hey Bhagawan!
overview: Expecting to inherit the family business, a young man instead finds himself running a very different enterprise while juggling love, lies, and an unexpected legacy.

title: Olivia & the Clouds
overview: Olivia & the Clouds explores love's complexities through a Rashomon effect. Olivia, haunted by a past love, hides it under her bed. She trades flowers with this ghost in exchange for comforting rain clouds. Barbara, rejected by Mauricio, escapes reality through fantastical stories. Mauricio, full of regrets, is swallowed by the earth. Ramon, smitten by Olivia, witnesses the growth of a strange plant mirroring her. With surreal elements, the film delves into the enduring power of love's memory.

title: Second Case of Seetharam
overview: Inspector Seetharam, hoping to reunite with his estranged sister after years apart, must track down a brutal, psychotic serial killer terrorising the town of Anegadde.

title: Bambukat 2
overview: Chanan Singh returns to his village after being dismissed from the royal palace, leading to a conflict with the crown over dignity and revolution.

title: Behadd
overview: Behadd is a Gujarati Film about a girl who falls for a boy hiding his true identity. When her father learns the truth, he and his friend race to save her from lies. A gripping tale of love, faith, and betrayal in modern-day Gujarat.

title: Suri Anna
overview: A gripping story of a man torn between circumstances and conscience, who is drawn into the dark world of crime. As his choices spiral out of control, only the unconditional love of his parents keeps him grounded.

title: Sarala Subbarao
overview: A romantic family drama set in 1970s Mysore that portrays the journey of Sarala and Subbarao as they balance love, tradition, and aspirations.

title: BODYCOUNT
overview: During a quiet moment of closeness, a young couple’s playful banter takes a profound and sobering turn when a simple question about the past redefines the meaning of "counting" one's life experiences.

title: Siva Sambo
overview: Siva, an ambitious youth aspiring to be a police officer, wins Sivani's love and marries her, only for her to be abducted the very next day by a powerful minister intent on forcing her into marriage. With a dangerous criminal also hunting her, the story centers on Sivani's strength and whether Siva can rescue her from his enemies.

title: L.S.S: Love Subscribe Share
overview: Shiva is an Intelligent. Smart College boy, Pooja a pretty young girl from a rich family study in the same college, Pooja falls in love with Shiva behalf of his kindness and gentility. Pooja decides to meet her Divorcee Mother living in Kashi, then Pooja going to Kashi with Shiva to meet her mother. Unfortunately Pooja met with an accident and hospitalized in Brain dead condition. Police takes Shiva to custody. Pooja’s Father Manipal and Uncle Sunil rushes to Kashi on search of Pooja, then all four go in search for Pooja all around the Kashi and Find her in Hospital at last in a brain dead condition. What happens next? Is she recovered from Brain dead condition, is the joins with Shiva? Is the twisted climax of the story.

title: Don’t Scroll
overview: This too shall pass.

title: Open Tabs
overview: After a breakup, a sleepless young man begins closing the countless tabs open on his computer until only one memory remains.

title: Voodoo Party
overview: A group of friends play an extreme game of dare where they curse themselves to a voodoo doll and hand over free rein to a friend. What could possibly go wrong?!

title: Pupa
overview: Set in a brothel in Varanasi, Pupa follows a few strangers whose unexpected meeting sparks rising conflicts and deep personal transformations.

title: Mathaayiyude Suvishesham
overview: Lazar, A chronic loser finally wins the fight of his life only to realize the prize was his mentor’s death. Now, as he walks into a funeral at the Havana Shappu, Lazar must relive the one duel he actually won: the one that sent Havana Mathayi on a fatal, one-way bender.

title: Probashe Agomon
overview: Documentary is a form of digital media  which speaks about the livelihood of people living in a city and their revelations about it. Durga Puja as a festival is mostly known for being celebrated by Bengali's (a community from eastern India).  Probashe  Agomon as translated directly "Arrival Abroad" is what Bengalis wait for throughout the year for a Glimpse of Maa Durga. This is not just a religious ceremony it is a cultural festival.

title: Ekaki : The Conqueror
overview: The story picks up with Kartik and his group of friends still trapped in the eerie, isolated village of Ambora. While previous chapters focused on the psychological fear of the unknown, the "Final Chapter" brings the threat into the light, revealing the true nature of the "presence" that has been terrorizing the village.

title: Hamnet
overview: The powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare's timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

title: The Secret Agent
overview: Brazil, 1977. Marcelo, a technology expert in his early 40s, is on the run. Hoping to reunite with his son, he travels to Recife during Carnival but soon realizes that the city is not the safe haven he was expecting.

title: Accused
overview: When a celebrated queer doctor in London is accused of sexual misconduct, her life unravels. Now under a storm of suspicion and scrutiny, her marriage fractures and the truth blurs. Her wife must decide whether to walk away, or fight for the woman the world is turning against.

title: Thaai Kizhavi
overview: Pavunuthaayi is a fiercely independent, intimidating elderly woman in a rural village, known for being tough, ruthless, and blunt-especially as a moneylender whose strict enforcement of dues makes her feared by locals.

title: Masthishka Maranam
overview: Plunging into a virtual reminiscence challenge to assuage his sorrow, a heartbroken dad uncovers a shocking revelation about Frida Soman, his long-admired icon and globally beloved luminary.

title: Vishnu Vinyasam
overview: A superstitious man confronts his deepest convictions when he discovers that the woman he has fallen for has a dark secret.

title: Fourth Floor
overview: Drawn Back to Chennai by an Unexpected Call From His Former Lover, Dheeren Travels From Mumbai and Checks Into a Secluded Office Guest House. Soon After His Arrival, Disturbing and Inexplicable Events Begin to Unfold Within Its Walls. Night After Night, Dheeren is Plagued by Vivid Dreams—fragments of Memories That Eerily Mirror His Own Past and Unresolved Relationship.  As the Line Between Dreams and Reality Begins to Blur, Dheeren Realizes These Visions Are Not Random. Each Dream is a Clue, Slowly Pulling Him Toward a Buried Truth Connected to His Ex-lover’s Fate. Trapped Between Guilt, Fear, and the Supernatural, Dheeren Must Confront His Past to Uncover What Truly Happened to Her—before the Guest House Claims Him as Its Next Secret.

title: DHET!
overview: The night takes a strange turn in Dhaka as a ride-sharing motorcyclist tries to reach his next passenger in time.

title: The Kerala Story 2 Goes Beyond
overview: Three young Indian women across different states choose love over tradition, only to become trapped. Their parallel lives show how romance and rebellion transform into control and silence, turning love into a weapon that destroys freedom.

title: Blue Bird
overview: Sidda is the only child of Maasti, a lazy farmer and Ganapi, a progressive woman who dreams of living in the town. Due to some unavoidable circumstances, the family is forced to move to the city. The film documents Sidda's journey as he explores the dense forest and sustainable living versus the chaotic hustle of the city that makes him feel alienated. Inspired by the folk tales his grandfather narrates, the 10 year old learns to explore all options before he makes the most important decision of returning to his roots.

title: Nukkad Naatak
overview: After being caught robbing the college canteen, best friends Molshri and Shivang are expelled. To be reinstated, they must enroll five children from an impoverished slum into a local school.

title: Aazhi
overview: Mukhila's Father Murthy comes to know about Arul and Mukhilas love affair. Murthy, who works as a boat mechanic, kidnaps Arul in a boat and beats him up. He plans to kill Arul so that he will not fall in love with his daughter. When the boat breaks down in the sea, Murthy, foot stuck in the motor and is both of them survived the rainstorm or not.

title: The Prisoner
overview: Daksh deals with his mental battles relying on only the two people he talks to, however, a new admirer enters into his life, bringing chaos. Daksh deals with the three of them but the final, mind-bending realization changes him completely.

title: Viyaah Kartaare Da
overview: A cunning but lazy man fakes his corrupt father's death to take over his police position, but chaos ensues when his father suddenly awakens from a coma.

title: Little Wings
overview: An old woman trapped in a bitter marriage is pushed to the brink when her paralyzed husband sets out to consume her pet rooster.

title: Chakranta
overview: Naina, a simple village girl chasing her dreams in Bhubaneswar, finds love with her charming colleague Prem, until one shocking night turns her world upside down. Arrested in a high-profile drug smuggling case, she must fight to prove her innocence as a dark conspiracy begins to unravel, testing love, trust, and survival.

title: Promoter Boudi
overview: Shanti, known as Promoter Boudi, plans to build an old-age home and orphanage on a prime plot, but a ruthless developer wants it for a shopping mall. As past secrets resurface, a battle begins between compassion and greed.

title: Tha Thavalayude Tha
overview: “When the prince, cursed by the witch, weeps for his beloved princess, it pours.” Once, Balu’s grandmother narrates this tale to him. Balu, who loved his grandma dearly, thought the tale to be true. Later, the teacher inquired of everyone in class,

title: Anhedonia
overview: Anhedonia is a quiet, introspective short film that explores the invisible transition from childhood innocence to the emotional stillness of adulthood. Through fragmented memories of friendship, laughter, and carefree days, the film contrasts the warmth of the past with the cold repetition of the present.  As time moves forward, joy slowly fades into routine, and life becomes a cycle of silent moments and unspoken thoughts. What once felt alive and limitless begins to feel distant, almost unreal.  Without dramatic events or dialogue, Anhedonia reflects on a feeling many experience but rarely name, the subtle loss of pleasure in everyday life. It is a meditation on nostalgia, isolation, and the quiet realization that growing up sometimes means growing apart from the joy we once knew.

title: It Was Here Before Our Time
overview: It Was Here Before Our Time immerses viewers in the enigmatic world of Maari Theyyam, an ancient ritual performed along the southern coast of Kerala, India. The documentary captures Maari Theyyam's raw energy and mysticism through intimate observational footage, revealing how the ritual serves as a communal act of healing and resilience.

title: KAAM 25
overview: A story where 3 ambitious small time gangsters set up a deal with a drug lord but they get kidnapped into an interrogation.
